visualDirection.motion: calm progress reveals, phone close-ups, alert timing ticks, proof overlays

scenes.title: Build trust before asking for action.
scenes.narration: Thrifty starts with a secure link, not another password. Sign in once, then let the app remember what might charge next.

scenes.title: Put future charges in the first viewport.
scenes.narration: The main screen is not a receipt drawer. It is a warning system for the next thing trying to charge you.

scenes.title: Add a subscription without inventing missing facts.
scenes.narration: If Thrifty does not know the amount or deadline, it says so. No fake certainty, no made-up cancellation window.

scenes.title: Sync platform sources into one durable list.
scenes.narration: Delete the app, change phones, come back later: the list lives with the account, not with one fragile install.

scenes.title: Schedule alerts before the charge.
scenes.narration: Thrifty does the boring timing maths for you: seven days, three days, one day, and two hours before it matters.

scenes.title: Log delivery honestly.
scenes.narration: When a warning goes out, Thrifty records what happened. Delivered, failed, or skipped: the system keeps the receipt for the reminder.

scenes.title: Prove the build, then show the proof.
scenes.narration: Before this becomes a launch story, it has to be a working system. The test runner gives one clean proof path.

scenes.title: Turn the walkthrough into the launch video.
scenes.narration: This is the launch spine: problem, interception, honest unknowns, alerts, proof, and a crisp reason to install.
